title: Behavioural Neuroscience Working Group
content:
Behavioural Neuroscience Working Group

Research Focus

The Behavioural Neuroscience Research Group is an academic research group that aims to examine the biological and psychosocial foundations of behaviour using an interdisciplinary approach. Bringing together expert academics from different scientific disciplines, the group aims to contribute to scientific knowledge production by addressing the underlying mechanisms of behaviour from a holistic perspective. The working group aims to develop research collaborations at national and international levels, strengthen interdisciplinary scientific interaction, and provide qualified academic contributions to the fields of behavioural sciences and neuroscience.
